Name: Endless Sky
Notes: Space trading and combat; open source.

Name: FrogComposband
Notes: Latest full Windows archive from GitHub releases (not the exe-only zip).

Name: Cataclysm DDA
Notes: Post-apocalyptic roguelike; open source. Enable tilesets in game options after install.

Name: Dwarf Fortress Classic
Notes: Free classic build from Bay 12 Games. Not open-source; license is shareware/free.

Name: Luanti
Notes: Voxel sandbox (successor to Minetest); open source.

Name: OpenTTD
Notes: Transport tycoon clone; open source. Add OpenGFX/OpenSFX (and optionally OpenMSX) from the Graphics tab for full visuals and sound.

Name: OpenMW
Notes: Open Morrowind engine; open source. Needs original Morrowind data files.

Name: OpenRA (release)
Notes: Command & Conquer-style RTS reimplementation; open source.

Name: OpenGFX 8
Notes: Base graphics set from openttd.org (install OpenTTD first recommended).
